chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4607 of 2017 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.19882/2017 2. For hearing of main case 05.03.2025 Mr. Nadir Hussain Abro, advocate for the petitioner Syed Ahsan Ali Shah, advocate for respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General It is jointly submitted that this matter is squarely covered by the judgment dated 15.05.2023 passed in CP D 3246 of 2019, therefore, in relying upon the reasoning therein this petition may also be dismissed. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
